query:
select u.pending_deletion_at,
               u.tier,
               coalesce(array_agg(f.followed_id) filter (where f.followed_id is not null), '{}') as "ids!: Vec<uuid::Uuid>"
          from users u
          left join follows f on f.follower_id = u.id
         where u.id = $1
         group by u.id
